Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
from html.parser import HTMLParser
import re

class ResultParser\(HTMLParser\):
    def __init__\(self\):
        super\(\).__init__\(\)
        self.in_td = False
        self.current_section = None
        self.current_class = None
        self.results = {}
        self.depth = 0
        self.collecting = False
        self.text_buffer = []
        
    def handle_starttag\(self, tag, attrs\):
        attrs_dict = dict\(attrs\)
        if tag == 'h2':
            self.collecting_h2 = True
        if tag == 'h3':
            self.collecting_h3 = True
            
    def handle_data\(self, data\):
        data = data.strip\(\)
        if data:
            self.text_buffer.append\(data\)

with open\('/tmp/npc_nationals.html', 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='replace'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Find Classic Physique section
cp_match = re.search\(r'CLASSIC PHYSIQUE', content, re.IGNORECASE\)
if cp_match:
    print\(f"Found CLASSIC PHYSIQUE at position {cp_match.start\(\)}"\)

# Find Women's sections
wb_match = re.search\(r"WOMEN'?S BODYBUILDING", content, re.IGNORECASE\)
if wb_match:
    print\(f"Found WOMEN'S BODYBUILDING at position {wb_match.start\(\)}"\)

wp_match = re.search\(r"WOMEN'?S PHYSIQUE", content, re.IGNORECASE\)
if wp_match:
    print\(f"Found WOMEN'S PHYSIQUE at position {wp_match.start\(\)}"\)
    
print\(f"\\nTotal HTML length: {len\(content\)}"\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import re

with open\('/tmp/npc_nationals.html', 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='replace'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Find all data-slug occurrences
slugs = re.findall\(r'data-slug="\([^"]+\)"', content\)
print\("All data-slugs found:"\)
for s in slugs:
    print\(f"  {s}"\)
EOF)
